title: Sterling ETN4535V 5 Pin Euro ThumbTurn Cylinder, Nickel, 45x35mm
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Standard section keyway, 3 Nickel plated brass keys
Note: The split for the measurement is 45mm internal
description: The Sterling 5 pin thumb turn EURO cylinder is manufactured solid brass body and plug with a 5 pin tumbler locking mechanism and anti-pick Mushroom pins. It also has a 30° offset cam, 12, 000 key differs and is finished in Nickel. sterling products are equal to the best in the market . Sterling is a brand of burger-watcher one of the largest manufactures of security products in the world. burg-watcher has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, Safes, post boxes and access control solutions.
